title: Magic Shield negate next targeting magic card and send both cards to cemetery

card.rawText: Negate the effect of the next magic card that targets the equipped creature. Once used, send the negated magic card and this card to the cemetery.

effect.value: Negate effect, send magic and this card to cemetery
